headline: These Red Hot AI Infrastructure Stocks Keep Paying Dividends
summary: Both Caterpillar and Eaton continue to deliver stellar performances in 2026, with their consistent dividend-paying natures reflecting attractive options for income-focused investors.

raw.headline: These Red Hot AI Infrastructure Stocks Keep Paying Dividends

headline: Eaton’s Omaha Switchgear Bet on AI and Electrification Could Be A Game Changer For Eaton (ETN)
summary: In early April 2026, Eaton announced it had invested more than US$30,000,000 to expand U.S. medium-voltage switchgear production with a new 370,000-square-foot facility near Omaha, Nebraska, scheduled to begin output in 2027 and support power needs for AI data centers, utilities and industrial customers. Shortly afterward, Eaton’s gold-level EcoVadis rating and recognition among the world’s most sustainability-focused companies highlighted how its power infrastructure expansion aligns with...
